headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences revises long-term strategy with focus on data analytics

sentiment.reasoning: A strategic pivot toward data analytics is a long-term operational shift that lacks immediate financial impact or clear near-term revenue implications.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences sees 8% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% drop in new customer orders indicates a weakening demand trend that will likely persist through the current quarter.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
